prompt: Build a premium healthcare website inspired by MediFlow - Streamline Your Medical Practice. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
MediFlow
Features Pricing Reviews Help
Features Pricing Reviews Help
Practice Management

Manage Your
Practice Efficiently

Complete EHR, patient scheduling, billing, and telemedicine. Save 10 hours per week. Used by 5,000+ clinics.

5K+

Practices

500K+

Patients

Powerful Features

Everything to run a modern practice

Smart Scheduling

Automated appointment scheduling reduces no-shows by 40%. SMS reminders included.

Electronic Health Records

HIPAA-compliant EHR. Complete patient history, notes, and test results in one place.

Billing & Payments

Automated billing, insurance claims, and payment processing. Save time on paperwork.

Telemedicine

Built-in HIPAA-compliant video consultations. Reach more patients remotely.

Analytics & Reports

Real-time dashboards show practice metrics, revenue, and patient trends.

Integrations

Connects with 100+ healthcare apps. API available for custom integrations.

Flexible Pricing

Scale with your practice

Starter

Up to 5 doctors

$499/mo

  • Scheduling
  • EHR basics
  • Billing
POPULAR

Professional

Up to 20 doctors

$1,299/mo

  • All Starter +
  • Advanced EHR
  • Telemedicine
  • Analytics

Enterprise

Unlimited doctors

Custom/mo

  • All features
  • Custom integration
  • Dedicated support

Loved by Practices

"Switched from our old system and saved 8 hours per week. The support team is incredible!"

— Dr. Robert Chen, Clinic Manager

"Best practice management software for mid-sized clinics. Implementation was smooth and fast."

— Dr. Lisa Martinez, Founder

FAQs

Yes, MediFlow is fully HIPAA compliant with end-to-end encryption, regular security audits, and comprehensive audit logs.
Most practices go live in 2-4 weeks. We provide dedicated implementation support and staff training at no extra cost.
We handle all data migration from your existing system. Secure, HIPAA-compliant transfer. No patient data loss guaranteed.

Run Your Practice Better

Free 30-day trial. No credit card required.
